hero.title: Exterior Home Repairs Built to Protect and Last
paragraphs: Restore8 GA helps homeowners across Metro Atlanta solve exterior repair issues with practical scopes, dependable craftsmanship, and repairs built for long-term performance.
We handle siding repair and replacement, soffit and fascia repair, trim replacement, porch and deck repair, structural exterior fixes, and weather-damage repair.

overview.title: Exterior repair and basement work built around the parts of the home homeowners cannot ignore
paragraphs: Restore8 is a local contractor focused on practical repair and improvement work that protects the home and makes it function better. We specialize in exterior repairs for the areas that take the most wear, including siding, trim, soffit, fascia, porches, decks, and structural exterior problem spots.

We also help homeowners turn underused lower levels into practical living space with basement finishing, basement remodeling, build-outs, framing improvements, and unfinished basement conversion work.
Our approach is straightforward: clear communication, dependable craftsmanship, and work built for long-term reliability instead of cosmetic-only fixes.

intro.title: Exterior home repair services that protect your property
paragraphs: We provide exterior home repair for the issues that affect protection, safety, and curb appeal: damaged siding, failing trim, rotted soffit and fascia, worn porches, weak deck framing, and other visible exterior deterioration.

Whether you need a siding repair contractor for targeted replacement or broader structural exterior fixes after age or weather exposure, we focus on durable materials, sound installation, and work that holds up season after season.

hero.title: Basement
paragraphs: Restore8 GA helps homeowners turn unfinished, outdated, or underused basements into practical living space with dependable scopes and durable workmanship.
We focus on basement finishing, basement remodeling, new build-outs, framing improvements, and unfinished basement conversion work designed around real everyday use.

intro.title: Basement finishing and build-outs that improve how your home works
paragraphs: We help homeowners get more from the lower level of the home with basement finishing plans that improve comfort, layout, and usability. Whether you want a family room, office, guest area, recreation space, or a more complete multi-use layout, we build with function in mind.

Our approach is practical: define how the space should work, plan the framing and layout clearly, coordinate waterproofing needs when necessary, and complete the build with durable finish work that feels integrated with the rest of the house.

services.title: Basement Services
introParagraphs: We do not position this work as luxury remodeling. We focus on the basement scopes that help homeowners gain more useful square footage and better everyday function.
That includes basement finishing, layout improvements, framing, build-outs, and practical planning around moisture-related conditions.

hero.title: About Us
paragraphs: Restore8 GA is built around the kind of work homeowners often need most: exterior repairs, structural updates, and basement improvements that make underused space functional and dependable.
We bring a practical, skilled-trades approach to every job, with clear communication and workmanship focused on long-term performance.

whoWeAre.title: A repair-focused contractor homeowners can count on
paragraphs: Restore8 GA was built to serve homeowners who need real repair expertise, not just cosmetic updates. Our work focuses on the parts of the house that take the most abuse and require dependable solutions: siding, trim, soffit, fascia, porches, decks, and basement spaces that are unfinished, outdated, or underused.

We believe homeowners deserve honest guidance when something on the property needs attention. That means identifying the problem clearly, recommending a sensible scope, and completing the work with craftsmanship that supports the structure and the day-to-day use of the home.

Over the years, we have developed a process centered on reliability, communication, and jobsite accountability. Whether we are repairing a damaged exterior section or planning a basement build-out, we stay focused on durable construction and practical results.
Clients choose us because we treat the work seriously, respect the home, and follow through from estimate to final walkthrough.

process.title: Our Simple, Start-to-Finish Process
introParagraphs: Our process is built for homeowners who need clarity. We inspect the condition, define the scope, and complete the work with a practical sequence that supports lasting results.
Whether the project is an exterior repair or a basement build-out, we keep the next steps clear from the first walkthrough onward.

columns.title: Walkthrough & Inspection
columns.lead: We look at the condition of the home, identify the problem areas, and discuss your priorities.

columns.title: Scope & Planning
columns.lead: We develop the repair or build plan, material approach, and project sequence.

columns.title: Construction & Coordination
columns.lead: We complete the work with attention to durability, communication, and jobsite accountability.

columns.title: Final Review
columns.lead: We review the completed work with you and close out the project with confidence.

items.title: Repair-Minded Expertise
items.description: We focus on solving the underlying issue, not just covering it up. That approach matters when exterior damage, rot, moisture exposure, or basement layout problems affect how the home performs.

items.title: Durability and Craftsmanship
items.description: From exterior material replacement to basement framing and finishing, our work is planned for long-term use, clean execution, and structural reliability.

items.title: Useful Basement Transformations
items.description: We help homeowners turn underused lower levels into living space that works better, with smarter layouts, coordinated waterproofing needs, and finish plans that fit everyday life.

items.question: What services does Restore8 GA specialize in?
items.answer: Our core work is exterior home repair and basement improvement. That includes siding repair and replacement, trim replacement, soffit and fascia repair, porch and deck repair or rebuild work, structural exterior fixes, weather-damage repair, basement finishing, basement remodeling, basement build-outs, framing updates, and unfinished basement conversion projects.

items.question: Are you licensed and insured?
items.answer: Restore8 GA operates as a Georgia state-licensed and insured contractor. That gives homeowners added peace of mind when the work involves structural repairs, exterior restoration, or basement construction inside an occupied home.

items.question: Where do you work?
items.answer: We work throughout Metro Atlanta and the surrounding greater Atlanta market. If you are unsure whether your property falls in our service area, share the location when you reach out and we will confirm next steps.

items.question: Do you work with homeowners and property owners?
items.answer: Yes. Our primary audience is homeowners, but we also work with property owners who need exterior repairs or basement upgrades completed with durability, straightforward communication, and a practical scope.

items.question: How do I get started?
items.answer: After you contact us or use Request a Quote, we gather basics about your goals and property. We then typically schedule a walkthrough so we can see the space, discuss constraints and opportunities, and understand budget and timing. From there we develop a detailed scope — what is included, what decisions are still open, and how the project will move through planning and construction.

items.question: Can you help with unfinished basement conversion projects?
items.answer: Yes. We handle unfinished basement conversion work for homeowners who want to create usable living space. We can improve framing and layout, build out rooms, coordinate waterproofing needs when necessary, and complete finishing work that makes the basement feel integrated with the rest of the house.

items.question: How long does a repair or basement project take?
items.answer: Timeline depends on the condition of the existing structure, how much replacement or reframing is needed, material lead times, and the overall scope. After the walkthrough, we provide a clearer expectation based on the actual work required.

items.question: Do you coordinate waterproofing for basement projects?
items.answer: Yes. When basement conditions show moisture concerns, we can coordinate waterproofing-related work as part of the overall project planning so the finished space has a better foundation for long-term performance.

items.question: What should I share when asking for an estimate?
items.answer: The most helpful starting details are the area of the home, the visible issue or goal, how long the problem has been present, and any photos or notes about water damage, structural concerns, or how you want the basement to function.
